text:
Just shipped https://t.co/V79nStpo7G 🎉

Vibecoding tool with one twist:
you bring your own Supabase.

Your data. Your infra. Forever.

→ https://t.co/V79nStpo7G

urls.title: Cadrant — Turn your idea into a web app in minutes
urls.description: Cadrant builds production-ready web applications from plain language. Describe what you want to build — get the UI, logic, and data layer. No code required for personal or creative projects.
